title: Right Click Item Picking
description:
(both MENU and CLICKING ITEM!)
pick items by right clicking whenever you want!
body:
# Right Click Item Picking
## pick items by right clicking whenever you want
## Config
#### Use `scoreboard players set <config> rcip.config <value>`
|Config|Description|Value|
|-:|-|-|
|`defMode`|The defalt mode of new players|`Right Click Menu`:0  `Right Click Items`:1 `Vanilla`:2 `No Picking`:3|
|`playerTip`|Conditions to show the tip to the players|Never:0 NewPlayers:1 JoinGame:2|
|`tipLoc`|The place to Message tip showing|Chat:0 Title:1 Subtitle:2 Custom(`#rcip:show_tip`,return fail to wait for next time):3|
|`updTick`|The number of ticks to wait for updating once|>0|
## Usage
#### Modes
1. `Right Click Menu` Mode
+ Players with this mode can use scroll wheel to choose and right click to pick up the item
+ Use `/trigger Right-Click-Item-Picking--Switch-picking-mode` to enable right click picking temporarily
2. `Right Click Items` Mode
+ Players with this mode can right click the item you *can reach* to pick it up
3. `Vanilla` Mode
+ Vanilla,but the pick up delay won't change when you cannot reach them
4. `No Picking` Mode
+ No picking!
#### Swiching
+ In `Right Click` mode,`left click` to switch near at least 1 item
+ Use `/trigger Right-Click-Item-Picking--Switch-picking-mode`
#### In Survival
+ **Adventuring**: Use `Right Click Menu` mode
+ **Combating**: Use `Vanilla`(for the loots) or `Right Click Items`(just for espace) Mode ( Or `Right Click Menu` if you jump when damaging )
+ **Mining**: Use `Right Click Items` Mode

## Uninstallation
+ Use:
```mcfunction
/function uninstall:right_click_item_picking
```

## Warning
1. Be careful to use it in your server because the datapack may causes game ticks to be lost when someone **attacks** the server.
